burst.msg_body: Multiple burst reads of variable length and bit width 32 in loop 'x_buff' has been inferred on bundle 'b_port'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of variable length and bit width 32 has been inferred on bundle 'A_port'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst writes of variable length and bit width 32 in loop 'row_loop' has been inferred on bundle 'c_port'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
